title: lci.mcp.search
description: Parameter schema for the MCP `search` tool. Mirrors the inline rules in create_search_validator() (src/mcp/validation.cpp) and validate_search_business_logic() (same file). The handler still enforces the pattern/patterns mutual-requirement business rule because JSON Schema cannot express 'at least one of these two string fields is non-empty' as cleanly as the existing helper.

pattern.description: Search pattern. Required unless `patterns` is provided.

patterns.description: Alias for `pattern`. At least one of {pattern, patterns} must be a non-empty string.

max.description: Max results (clamped to [1,100] by the handler).
